debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : 100 ≤ n
S : Finset ℕ
hS : S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n)
⊢ (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) ∨
    ∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)

failed_attempts:
set k := Nat.sqrt n with hk_def
  set a := 2 * k ^ 2 + 3 - 4 * k with ha
  set b := 2 * k ^ 2 + 6 - 8 * k with hb
  set c := 2 * k ^ 2 - 2 with hc
  have hk : 10 ≤ k := sqrt_ge_10 hn
  have ha_mem : a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) :=
    Finset.mem_Icc.mpr (triangle_mem_a hn)
  have hb_mem : b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) :=
    Finset.mem_Icc.mpr (triangle_mem_b hn)
  have hc_mem : c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) :=
    Finset.mem_Icc.mpr (triangle_mem_c hn)
  have hab_ne : a ≠ b := triangle_ne_ab hk
  have hac_ne : a ≠ c := triangle_ne_ac hk
  have hbc_ne : b ≠ c := triangle_ne_bc hk
  have hab_sq : IsSquare (a + b) :=
    ⟨2 * k - 3, by rw [show a + b = (2 * k - 3) ^ 2 from sum_ab_sq hk]; ring⟩
  have hbc_sq : IsSquare (b + c) :=
    ⟨2 * k - 2, by rw [show b + c = (2 * k - 2) ^ 2 from sum_bc_sq hk]; ring⟩
  have hac_sq : IsSquare (a + c) :=
    ⟨2 * k - 1, by rw [show a + c = (2 * k - 1) ^ 2 from sum_ac_sq hk]; ring⟩
  -- Pigeonhole: among {a, b, c}, two must be in S or two in Sᶜ
  by_cases haS : a ∈ S
  · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
    · exact Or.inl ⟨a, haS, b, hbS, hab_ne, hab_sq⟩
    · by_cases hcS : c ∈ S
      · exact Or.inl ⟨a, haS, c, hcS, hac_ne, hac_sq⟩
      · exact Or.inr ⟨b, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_mem, hbS⟩,
          c, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_mem, hcS⟩, hbc_ne, hbc_sq⟩
  · by_cases hbS : b ∈ S
    · by_cases hcS : c ∈ S
      · exact Or.inl ⟨b, hbS, c, hcS, hbc_ne, hbc_sq⟩
      · exact Or.inr ⟨a, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨ha_mem, haS⟩,
          c, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hc_mem, hcS⟩, hac_ne, hac_sq⟩
    · exact Or.inr ⟨a, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨ha_mem, haS⟩,
        b, Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hb_mem, hbS⟩, hab_ne, hab_sq⟩
